protein_name: Interacts strongly with CDK6, weakly with CDK4. Inhibits cell growth and proliferation with a correlated dependence on endogenous retinoblastoma protein RB. Belongs to the CDKN2 cyclin-dependent kinase inhibitor family. Highest levels found in skeletal muscle. Also found in pancreas and heart. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Protein type: Cell cycle regulation; Inhibitor; Protein kinase, regulatory subunit
raw_fields.Molecular Function: cyclin-dependent protein serine/threonine kinase inhibitor activity; protein binding; protein kinase binding
raw_fields.Biological Process: negative regulation of cell growth; negative regulation of cell population proliferation; oligodendrocyte differentiation; regulation of G1/S transition of mitotic cell cycle
raw_fields.Alt. Names/Synonyms: CDK6 inhibitor p18; CDKN2C; CDKN6; CDN2C; cyclin dependent kinase inhibitor 2C; cyclin-dependent inhibitor; Cyclin-dependent kinase 4 inhibitor C; Cyclin-dependent kinase 6 inhibitor; cyclin-dependent kinase 6 inhibitor p18; cyclin-dependent kinase inhibitor 2C (p18, inhibits CDK4); INK4C; p18; p18-INK4c; p18-INK6
